response.justification: The candidate is a strong senior individual contributor with 15+ years of development experience and genuine developer-tooling credentials (test runners, assertion libraries, CI/CD infrastructure, MCP code generators), but the role is fundamentally a people-management position and the resume shows no formal people-management or team-leadership experience. Technical leadership is implied through founding a project, workshops, and mentoring activities, yet there is no evidence of conducting performance reviews, managing direct reports, or leading organizational change. Mobile experience exists but is limited (iOS/Apple TV app maintenance nearly a decade ago).
strengths: Deep and broad engineering experience (15+ years) exceeding the 8-year minimum
Authentic developer-tools background: test runners (Trial), assertion libraries, CI servers, GitLab administration, MCP code generators
Strong quality-engineering culture fit: TDD, pairing, trunk-based development, testing workshops and courses
concerns: No documented people-management experience (role requires 2+ years managing teams)
No formal technical leadership title or evidence of roadmap/strategy ownership at organizational scale
Mobile-platform experience is dated and shallow relative to the role's mobile ecosystem focus

key_factors.factor: Developer tooling and testing infrastructure background
